headline: PG&E Corporation (PCG) Reports Strong Q1 Results, Reaffirms Full-Year Guidance
summary: PG&E Corporation (NYSE:PCG) is included among the 10 Best Electrical Infrastructure Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. PG&E Corporation (NYSE:PCG) provides natural gas and electric service to residential and business customers in northern and central California. PG&E Corporation (NYSE:PCG) reported strong results for its Q1 2026 on April 23, with the company exceeding estimates […]
